journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Hebrew ken? (Yes?): A minimal format for inviting the review of prior talk
title_en: Hebrew ken? (Yes?): A minimal format for inviting the review of prior talk

plain_summary_en: This paper studies Hebrew ken? (Yes?): A minimal format for inviting the review of prior talk. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Hebrew, Ken, Yes, Minimal. The abstract suggests a review approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
